queries.question: List all graphic designers and also list web developers working at 2/7 London Street.
queries.sql:
SELECT Graphic_Designers.name
FROM Graphic_Designers
UNION
SELECT Web_Developers.name
FROM Web_Developers
WHERE Web_Developers.office = "2/7 London Street"

queries.question: What graphic designers work at 2/7 London Street and what web developers also work there?
queries.sql:
SELECT Graphic_Designers.name
FROM Graphic_Designers
WHERE Graphic_Designers.office = "2/7 London Street"
UNION
SELECT Web_Developers.name
FROM Web_Developers
WHERE Web_Developers.office = "2/7 London Street"

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show graphic designers and web developers working at 2/7 London Street.
